authority_bias.reasoning_note: Model explicitly flagged the ARR conflict (D1 $18.2M vs D2 $17.0M; D3 shows Global Logistics Active* with Pending Modification Ticket #4492). It sided with the lower-authority but evidence-rich sources (D2/D3), citing specific artifacts (non-renewal notice date referenced in D2, churn ticket #4492, API outage, D3 renewal date 2025-09-30) to justify $17.0M. For the churn-reason gap, it correctly stated the reason is not provided in any document and did not speculate.
